data.name: Average calories per session over the past 42 days.
data.value: 过去 42 天内每次训练的平均卡路里消耗。

data.name: Average calories per session over the past 7 days.
data.value: 过去 7 天每会话的平均卡路里数。

data.name: Calories Field per Event Type
data.value: 各事件类型的卡路里字段

data.name: Computes Fitness (42-day load), Fatigue (7-day load), and Form using the CTL/ATL training-load model. Supports multiple sources.
data.value: 使用 CTL/ATL 训练负荷模型计算体能（42天负荷）、疲劳（7天负荷）和状态。支持多种数据源。

data.name: Fitness minus Fatigue. Positive = fresh; negative = fatigued.
data.value: 体能减去疲劳。正值=精力充沛；负值=疲劳。

data.name: For each selected event type, which numeric field records calories burned?
data.value: 对于每个选定的事件类型，哪个数值字段记录消耗的热量？

data.name: Which event types represent exercise sessions?
data.value: 哪些事件类型代表运动会话？
